dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Individualize treatment based on tumor type, disease state, response to treatment, patient risk factors, and current clinical practice standards. (2.1) Renal impairment: Reduce the dose of hydroxyurea by 50% in patients with creatinine clearance less than 60 mL/min. ( 2.3 , 8.6, 12.3 ) 2.1 Dosing Information Hydroxyurea is used alone or in conjunction with other antitumor agents or radiation therapy to treat neoplastic diseases. Individualize treatment based on tumor
